name: French Village Ba Na Hills Viewpoint

reviews.author: PARTHA BHATTACHARJEE
reviews.text: I have never visited France or rather any country of Europe, so strolling through this village was a feeling of walking in somewhere in France. There are many things in here to enjoy, restaurants, beer shop, gaming zone, roller coaster rides etc. Just walk around the vast complex and absorb the vibe and enjoy. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Jonahs Travel
reviews.text: Exploring the French Village in Bana Hills felt like walking through a dream — cool mountain air, charming European-style buildings, and breathtaking views all around 🌤️🏰

reviews.author: Prakash Natarajan
reviews.text: Its like stepping into a little piece of Europe in Danang, Vietnam. High up in the mountains with charming spot with cobblestone streets, copy cafes, and beautiful old style ambience. Love it 😍

reviews.author: Follow Fauzia
reviews.text: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ A magical escape to Europe… in Vietnam! 🇫🇷✨ WOW! 🤯 Who would’ve thought you could find a full-on French village perched high up in the clouds of Ba Na Hills?! 🏰⛅ This place is like stepping into a fairy tale 🧚‍♀️ — cobblestone streets, charming European architecture, and that mountain air… c’est magnifique! 💨🇻🇳 But wait — it’s not just beautiful buildings! There’s a WHOLE amusement park too! 🎢🎠 From exciting rides to nostalgic carousels, arcade games 🕹️, and fun fair booths where you can win prizes 🎯🎁 — it’s a dreamland for kids and grown-ups alike! 💡Pro tip: You can actually stay overnight in the hotels right inside the French Village! 🏨🌙 That means more time to explore, take amazing photos 📸, and soak in the magical vibes at sunset and sunrise 🌅🌄 (which are next level when you’re this high up!). 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Perfect for families, couples, or even solo adventurers looking for a unique escape. Every corner is photo-worthy and the atmosphere is electric 🎉🪄 Highly recommend making a full day (or even a weekend!) out of it. You won’t believe you’re still in Vietnam 🇻🇳💙 🎟️🎈🎡 10/10 unforgettable experience! Remember to Follow Fauzia and all of her social media platforms such as YouTube Instagram Facebook TikTok! You can also follow us here on Google maps for all of our adventures that we go through in life and in our travel journeys!

reviews.author: SL Wong
reviews.text: Nice village to walk around and take pictures. Interesting architecture. If you walk further, there is a fun fair and even a bana brewery.

reviews.author: Russ Lacuata
reviews.text: Like stepping into a little piece of Europe in Danang, Vietnam. High up in the mountains with charming spot with cobblestone streets, copy cafes, and beautiful old style buildings.

reviews.author: JTKW_sg
reviews.text: This place has tons of buildings build supposedly during French colonial period and is maintained well for tourists to visit. Absolute nice and stunning for tourists.

reviews.author: King Nitheerat
reviews.text: There are a lot of place to visit.Great beer.🍺 Beautiful castle. 🏰 good weather

reviews.author: Devon Nguyen
reviews.text: Cloudy that you can find the way. Free craft beer and live music

reviews.author: Mild Tim
reviews.text: Ms Daisy and Mr. Henry for restaurants La Crique are very nice and supportive, gave us a very useful recommendations. The restaurant is very nice, foods are good 👍🏻

reviews.author: Simon Paul
reviews.text: Breathtaking french architecture with lots of fun activities

reviews.author: Buncha
reviews.text: You need to see it to appreciate it.

reviews.author: 有井智子
reviews.text: spa rhone.therapy robin verry.good and therapyLittle

reviews.author: wenfu lin
reviews.text: 走在法國村的每一個角落，都會讓你有置身法國的感覺，很難用文字表達，蠻不錯的

reviews.author: Chan jy
reviews.text: 太陽世界很大，除了法國村之外還有遊樂設施，但要有人帶路不然停留時間不夠。

reviews.author: QUANG THE NGUYEN (thequang2194)
reviews.text: Một trong những công trình được du khách yêu thích nhất khi đến với Ba Na Hills là Làng Pháp, du khách bước vào hành trình trải nghiệm một không gian sống tinh tế, đậm chất thơ của một nước Pháp cổ điển và lãng mạn với những công trình kiến trúc độc đáo như: quảng trường, thị trấn, làng mạc, khách sạn, khám phá nhà thờ Saint Dennis – công trình có kiến trúc mái vòm cung với những bức tường đá xù xì sống động

reviews.author: Ferryanita F
reviews.text: Banyak spot foto menarik. Permainan paling seru Roller Coaster yang kecepatannya bisa kita atur sendiri.

reviews.author: Maria Jose Porras
reviews.text: Interesante la idea de reproducir a pequeña escala el paisaje arquitectónico francés. Rodeado de vistas espectaculares y precioso y romántico.

reviews.author: Magdolna Hargitay
reviews.text: Egy igazi "giccsparádé", de kihagyhatatlan. Egy modern szórakoztató komplexum, amelyet a XX. század eleji francia gyarmati stílus inspirált és a Ba Na-hegyek hűvös, ködös környezetébe építettek. A területet a háborúk idején elhagyták és a legtöbb eredeti építmény romba dőlt. Az üdülőhely megalkotásával azonban újjáélesztették a területet és a francia falu az eredeti gyarmati stílusra utaló, de modern turisztikai igényekre szabott replikaként jött létre. A falu kialakítása aprólékosan megtervezett, macskaköves utcákkal, francia stílusú épületekkel, szökőkutakkal és szobrokkal. A cél az, hogy a látogatók egy pillanatra elfeledkezzenek arról, hogy Vietnámban vannak és egy romantikus, mesebeli francia kisvárosban érezzék magukat. A gondosan megtervezett utcák a XII-XIV. századi francia építészetet idézik. Érdekes építmények közé tartozik a Saint Denis templom replikája és egy óratorony.
